description: Jarry Xiao discusses Atlas, a new implementation of the Solana virtual machine, focusing on its capabilities for verifiable finance and how it scales reads, writes, and replication. Key features include low latency and high throughput.
topic_summary: Atlas scales the Solana virtual machine by implementing read-write separation and introducing rpcx for easier data processing. It aims to enhance performance while maintaining compatibility with Solana mainnet [t=7:04].
